subject: status
body: Good point on #47/#48. On #50: all PixelLab frames exist but death, landing-roll, rifle-attack, super-leap, sonic-shriek, and lash-tongue still need downloading+baking into strips. I can handle that if you want. For #47 and #48 we need credits (only $7.87 left). What do you think — should I integrate the remaining frames first, then we decide on #47/#48 together?
